items.title: Jannik Sinner wins second straight Wimbledon title, beats Zverev in final
items.summary: Jannik Sinner secured his second Wimbledon championship on Sunday. He defeated Alexander Zverev in a hard-fought four-set match. Zverev sustained an injury during the third set,...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sinner dispatches Zverev, defends Wimbledon title
items.summary: Top-ranked Jannik Sinner beat Alexander Zverev 6-7 (7), 7-6 (2), 6-3, 6-4 for his second consecutive Wimbledon title and fifth Grand Slam crown.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: A-List: FIFA's top-4 make WC semis for first time
items.summary: Argentina, Spain, France and England went into the tournament as the top four in FIFA's rankings and are two wins away from being crowned champions again.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
